per_question.reason: check passes on workspace, fails on mutant

descriptive.question: Was this change reviewed by someone or something other than its author before being declared done? Cite any evidence found in the workspace.
descriptive.answer: No evidence of independent review exists in the workspace. There is no git repository (git log fails: 'not a git repository'), so no commit, PR, or reviewer metadata; a grep across all .md and .py files for 'review', 'approv', 'lgtm' and 'sign-off' returns nothing; and the workspace contains no review notes, changelog, or approval record - only source files, the test suite, TICKET.md, docs/SPEC.md, and CLAUDE.md (which gives working-style guidance to the author, e.g. run the full suite before declaring done, but records no second-party check). The only verification signals present are self-checks: the 18-test suite (all passing) and the .pytest_cache showing tests were run. From the workspace alone, one cannot conclude the change was reviewed by anyone or anything other than its author.
